summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Security Services (CSS) is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm that offers penetration testing, virtual CISO, SOC, incident response, and compliance services to U.S. organizations, with a notable history as an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework.

## Key Extracted Information

| Category | Details |
|---|---|
| **Company Name** | Cyber Security Services (CSS) |
| **Contact Info** | No phone or email explicitly provided. Headquarters: Westerville, Ohio (Columbus metro). Contact via "Schedule a Consultation" form. |
| **Services / Products** | Penetration Testing, Virtual CISO (vCISO), Incident Response, Security Operations Center (SOC), Risk Assessment & Compliance (SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA, CMMC), Cybersecurity Consulting, AI security. |
| **Target Audience** | U.S. organizations, including Fortune 100 companies (clients since 2014). |
| **Unique Value Propositions** | Original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework (named alongside Microsoft, IBM, DHS, DoD). Independent, senior-practitioner-led firm. Focus on auditable, durable security outcomes. |
| **Pricing / Packaging** | Not disclosed on the provided pages. |
